text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper exists at arXiv:2309.03907, titled "DrugChat: Towards Enabling ChatGPT-Like Capabilities on Drug Molecule **Graphs**" (not "data"), authored by Youwei Liang, Ruiyi Zhang, Li Zhang, and Pengtao Xie. The cited reference has a wrong subtitle word ("data" vs. "graphs"), a completely fabricated author list (Zhen Liang, Xu Yang, Qiang Liu, Bin He, Suyang Zheng, Bo Tang — none match the real authors), and a wrong arXiv ID (2304.02285 instead of 2309.03907), all hallmark signs of a grafted/fabricated reference.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03907
